sn1.73:1.1: “What is a person’s best wealth here?
sn1.73:1.3: What’s the most excellent of savors?
sn1.73:1.4: Living in what way is one’s life called the best?”
sn1.73:2.1: “Conviction is a person’s best wealth here.
sn1.73:2.3: Truth is the most excellent of savors.
sn1.73:2.4: Living with discernment, one’s life is called best.”
